channel.title: Image-Generation on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Image-Generation on Arrans github.io

item.title: huggingface/diffusers
item.description: 🤗 Diffusers: State-of-the-art diffusion models for image and audio generation in PyTorch and FLAX.

item.title: khoj-ai/khoj
item.description: Your AI second brain. Get answers to your questions, whether they be online or in your own notes. Use online AI models (e.g gpt4) or private, local LLMs (e.g llama3). Self-host locally or use our cloud instance. Access from Obsidian, Emacs, Desktop app, Web or Whatsapp.

item.title: mudler/LocalAI
item.description: 🤖 The free, Open Source alternative to OpenAI, Claude and others. Self-hosted and local-first. Drop-in replacement for OpenAI, running on consumer-grade hardware. No GPU required. Runs gguf, transformers, diffusers and many more models architectures. Features: Generate Text, Audio, Video, Images, Voice Cloning, Distributed inference

item.title: vercel/satori
item.description: Enlightened library to convert HTML and CSS to SVG

item.title: invoke-ai/InvokeAI
item.description: InvokeAI is a leading creative engine for Stable Diffusion models, empowering professionals, artists, and enthusiasts to generate and create visual media using the latest AI-driven technologies. The solution offers an industry leading WebUI, supports terminal use through a CLI, and serves as the foundation for multiple commercial products.

item.title: donahowe/AutoStudio
item.description: AutoStudio: Crafting Consistent Subjects in Multi-turn Interactive Image Generation

item.title: fboulnois/stable-diffusion-docker
item.description: Run the official Stable Diffusion releases in a Docker container with txt2img, img2img, depth2img, pix2pix, upscale4x, and inpaint.
